title: Verify API key with special characters is handled correctly
description: Test that API keys containing special characters are properly escaped and accepted
preconditions: API key with special characters ($, &, !, etc.) is available

steps.description: 1. Create API key with special characters
2. Add to .zshrc with proper quoting: export OPENCODE_KEY='key$with&special!chars'
4. Verify key is correctly stored and accessible

expected_result: API key with special characters is stored and retrieved correctly without shell interpretation
